title: Wire working_root through registry and supervisor
description:
BackendRegistry, SupervisorOrchestrator, and RoutingDecision pass config.paths.working_root through to each backend
Ensure no backend defaults to Path.cwd() independently
Verification: `python -m pytest tests/ -x`
acceptance_criteria: All backends instantiated via registry receive config working_root
No backend falls back to Path.cwd() internally
make config-show shows working_root matches expectation
